courses.title: Comprehensive BSN Board & Licensing Review
outcomes: Synthesize concepts across Fundamentals, Anatomy, Physiology, Pharmacology, Pathophysiology, Medical-Surgical, Pediatrics, Obstetrics, and Mental Health Nursing.
Demonstrate high-yield NCLEX/PNC exam style clinical reasoning, prioritization, and delegation skills.
Apply test-taking strategies for multiple-choice, select-all-that-apply, and case-study examination formats.

courses.title: Senior Clinical Internship Practicum II
outcomes: Demonstrate full entry-level professional nurse competency across specialized acute, critical, and outpatient hospital units.
Manage patient workloads independently with safe medication administration, documentation, and handover reporting.
Apply ethical practice, cultural safety, patient advocacy, and emergency intervention protocols.

courses.title: Leadership & Professional Nursing Capstone
outcomes: Complete a clinical quality improvement (QI) or patient-safety capstone project in a partner healthcare facility.
Present capstone findings to clinical leadership, proposing evidence-based practice changes.
